'''thathafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oaker|oaker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oaker|oaker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thathafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæthæfæth|thæthæfæth]] || [[word:thæthæfæj|thæthæfæj]] || [[word:thæthæfæsh|thæthæfæsh]] || [[word:thæthæfæ|thæthæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathafath|thathathafath]] || [[word:thathathafaj|thathathafaj]] || [[word:thathathafash|thathathafash]] || [[word:thathathafa|thathathafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathafath|thathafath]] || [[word:thathafaj|thathafaj]] || [[word:thathafash|thathafash]] || [[word:thathafa|thathafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathaffafth|thathaffafth]] || [[word:thathaffafj|thathaffafj]] || [[word:thathaffafsh|thathaffafsh]] || [[word:thathaffaf|thathaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thathafatha|thathafatha]] || [[word:thathafaja|thathafaja]] || [[word:thathafasha|thathafasha]] || [[word:thathafaka|thathafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thathafath|thathafath]] || [[word:thathafaj|thathafaj]] || [[word:thathafash|thathafash]] || [[word:thathafa|thathafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thathafathal|thathafathal]] || [[word:thathafajal|thathafajal]] || [[word:thathafashal|thathafashal]] || [[word:thathafakal|thathafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thathafaathatha|thathafaathatha]] || [[word:thathafaajaja|thathafaajaja]] || [[word:thathafaashasha|thathafaashasha]] || [[word:thathafaaka|thathafaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thathafathan|thathafathan]] || [[word:thathafajan|thathafajan]] || [[word:thathafashan|thathafashan]] || [[word:thathafakan|thathafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thathafathaoro|thathafathaoro]] || [[word:thathafajaoro|thathafajaoro]] || [[word:thathafashaoro|thathafashaoro]] || [[word:thathafakaoro|thathafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
